message: New email from Martin Peers: The Briefing: The High Cost of AI

metadata.subject: The Briefing: The High Cost of AI
metadata.preview: Hey, ChatGPT, can you explain this artificial intelligence disconnect? In a blog post today, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said, “Growth in the use of AI services has been astonishing.” ͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌
